sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# The board didn't change after clicking (11, 15). Let me check what actually changed
# by comparing previous_frame to current_frame
if last_transition and last_transition.before_frame:
    before_seg = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation['nodes']
    after_seg = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation['nodes']
    before_ids = {n['id'] for n in before_seg}
    after_ids = {n['id'] for n in after_seg}
    print(f"Before IDs:", sorted(before_ids))
    print("After IDs:", sorted(after_ids))
else:
    print("No transition to compare")

# Let me look at the ascii more carefully for a small region around the center pieces
ascii = current_frame.ascii
lines = ascii.split('\n')
# Show rows 10-15
for i in range(10, 16):
    if i < len(lines):
        print(f"Row {i}: {lines[i]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
